reason: Parent acceptance criteria and non-negotiable constraints for final integration review.
Architecture boundaries and data flow to verify implementation against.
Phased checklist and validation plan for child tasks and final PR.
Verify implementation keeps Codex crate reuse limited to approved local/backend helpers and does not add protocol/runtime coupling.
Check mailbox scheduler, source dedup, wait/wake and waiting item behavior.
Check tool catalog assembly and Environment ContextFrame behavior.
Check RuntimeSession remains delivery/trace and AgentRun workspace remains command owner.
Check frontend projection and generated contracts keep lifecycle/runtime identities separate.
